title: euclea racemosa subsp. bernardii
intro: Euclea racemosa subsp. bernardii, commonly known as the "River Curtissia", is a plant species within the family Ebenaceae, native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Euclea racemosa subsp. bernardii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
